entries.name: Taronga Zoo
entries.desc: A large harbourside zoo reached by ferry from the city, with a cable car linking its terraced enclosures. The setting and animal variety suit a full family outing.

photo.alt: Giraffe at Taronga Zoo with the Sydney skyline in the background
photo.credit: <!-- photo: taronga-zoo-sydney-harbour.jpg — Wikimedia Commons CC BY 2.0 · "Taronga Zoo, Sydney (483464) (9440360701).jpg" by Robert Linsdell · https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Taronga_Zoo,_Sydney_(483464)_(9440360701).jpg -->

entries.name: Tiergarten Schönbrunn
entries.desc: Set within the grounds of Schönbrunn Palace, this zoo pairs baroque pavilions with modern habitats. The compact, walkable layout works well for younger children.

photo.alt: Zoo grounds and pathways within the Schönbrunn Palace park
photo.credit: <!-- photo: schoenbrunn-zoo-vienna.jpg — Wikimedia Commons CC BY-SA 3.0 · "Tiergarten Schoenbrunn overview.jpg" by Manfred Werner (Tsui) · https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Tiergarten_Schoenbrunn_overview.jpg -->

entries.name: Tivoli Gardens
entries.desc: A landscaped amusement park in the heart of the city, mixing gentle and classic rides with gardens, gaming stalls, and evening lights. Central location makes it easy to combine with other sights.

photo.alt: Illuminated garden walkway lined with ornamental lamps at Tivoli Gardens
photo.credit: <!-- photo: tivoli-gardens-copenhagen-lights.jpg — Wikimedia Commons CC0 · "Lights - Tivoli Gardens (Copenhagen) - DSC08397.JPG" by Daderot · https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Lights_-_Tivoli_Gardens_(Copenhagen)_-_DSC08397.JPG -->

entries.name: LEGOLAND Billund
entries.desc: The first Legoland park, built beside the company's home town, with rides and detailed brick-built models. It is aimed squarely at families with younger children.

photo.alt: Aerial view of the Miniland brick-built cityscape at Legoland Billund
photo.credit: <!-- photo: legoland-billund-miniland.jpg — Wikimedia Commons CC BY 3.0 · "Legoland Billund - Miniland.jpg" by Legoland Billund Resort · https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Legoland_Billund_-_Miniland.jpg -->

entries.name: Disneyland Paris
entries.desc: A resort east of Paris combining a classic Disney castle park with an adjoining studio park. It is reachable by regional rail, making a day trip from the city straightforward.

photo.alt: Visitors entering Disneyland Paris beneath the entrance station building
photo.credit: <!-- photo: disneyland-paris-entrance.jpg — Wikimedia Commons CC BY 2.0 · "Disneyland Park 05, Paris 22 August 2013.jpg" by flightlog · https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Disneyland_Park_05,_Paris_22_August_2013.jpg -->

entries.name: Europa-Park
entries.desc: Germany's largest theme park, laid out as themed areas modelled on different European countries. It balances thrill coasters with gentler rides for a mixed-age family.

photo.alt: Aerial view of Europa-Park's themed areas and roller coasters
photo.credit: <!-- photo: europa-park-rust-aerial.jpg — Wikimedia Commons CC BY-SA 3.0 · "Europapark Rust.JL.jpg" by Jonaslange · https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Europapark_Rust.JL.jpg -->

entries.name: Miniatur Wunderland
entries.desc: An indoor model-railway attraction in Hamburg's warehouse district, with detailed miniature landscapes, working trains, and an airport. Its scale and moving detail hold children's attention indoors.

photo.alt: Detailed miniature airport model with aircraft at Miniatur Wunderland
photo.credit: <!-- photo: miniatur-wunderland-knuffingen-airport.jpg — Wikimedia Commons CC BY-SA 4.0 · "2025-Miniatur-Wunderland Hamburg-8 Knuffingen Airport.jpg" by Miniatur Wunderland Hamburg GmbH · https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:2025-Miniatur-Wunderland_Hamburg-8_Knuffingen_Airport.jpg -->

entries.name: Tokyo Disney Resort
entries.desc: A two-park resort near Tokyo pairing a traditional Disneyland with the nautically themed DisneySea, unique to Japan. It is easily reached by train from central Tokyo.

photo.alt: Cinderella Castle illuminated at dusk at Tokyo Disneyland
photo.credit: <!-- photo: tokyo-disneyland-cinderella-castle.jpg — Wikimedia Commons CC BY-SA 4.0 · "Tokyo Disney Land -Cinderella Castle-.jpg" by Takesi0705 · https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Tokyo_Disney_Land_-Cinderella_Castle-.jpg -->

entries.name: Efteling
entries.desc: A fairy-tale themed park built around a wooded Fairy Tale Forest of storybook scenes, alongside dark rides and coasters. The storybook focus appeals strongly to younger children.

photo.alt: Entrance to the Sprookjesbos (Fairy Tale Forest) at Efteling
photo.credit: <!-- photo: efteling-sprookjesbos-entrance.jpg — Wikimedia Commons CC BY-SA 2.0 · "Sprookjesbos entrance 02.jpg" by bertknot · https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Sprookjesbos_entrance_02.jpg -->

entries.name: Universal Studios Singapore
entries.desc: A movie-themed park on Sentosa Island, divided into zones based on films and franchises. Its compact size and mix of gentle and thrill rides suit families over a single day.

photo.alt: Front entrance of Universal Studios Singapore on Sentosa Island
photo.credit: <!-- photo: universal-studios-singapore-entrance.jpg — Wikimedia Commons CC0 · "Front Universal Singapore.jpg" by Iscream icecream · https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Front_Universal_Singapore.jpg -->

entries.name: Singapore Zoo
entries.desc: Known for its open, moat-based enclosures that avoid heavy bars and cages, giving close but naturalistic animal viewing. The layout and shade make it manageable with children.

photo.alt: Entrance to Singapore Zoo in Mandai
photo.credit: <!-- photo: singapore-zoo-entrance.jpg — Wikimedia Commons CC BY-SA 4.0 · "Entrance - Singapore Zoo (01).jpg" by Dan arndt · https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Entrance_-_Singapore_Zoo_(01).jpg -->

entries.name: PortAventura World
entries.desc: A large resort on the Costa Daurada with themed lands, a water park, and the adjoining Ferrari Land. The range of rides spans toddlers to older thrill-seekers.

photo.alt: Entrance to PortAventura World in Salou
photo.credit: <!-- photo: portaventura-entrance.jpg — Wikimedia Commons CC BY-SA 4.0 · "PortAventura.jpg" by Uxuee123 · https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:PortAventura.jpg -->

entries.name: Gröna Lund
entries.desc: A compact amusement park on Stockholm's Djurgården island, built into a tight waterfront site with rides packed close together. Its central setting pairs easily with nearby museums.

photo.alt: Gröna Lund amusement park on Djurgården, Stockholm
photo.credit: <!-- photo: grona-lund-djurgarden.jpg — Wikimedia Commons CC BY-SA 4.0 · "Gröna Lund på Djurgården.jpg" by Pellesten · https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Gr%C3%B6na_Lund_p%C3%A5_Djurg%C3%A5rden.jpg -->

entries.name: IMG Worlds of Adventure
entries.desc: A fully indoor, climate-controlled theme park in Dubai with Marvel, Cartoon Network, and dinosaur-themed zones. Being enclosed makes it a practical option during the region's intense heat.

photo.alt: Dinosaur-themed Lost Valley zone inside IMG Worlds of Adventure, Dubai
photo.credit: <!-- photo: img-worlds-of-adventure-lost-valley.jpg — Wikimedia Commons CC BY 2.0 · "Velociraptor (IMG Worlds of Adventure) 1.jpg" by Jeremy Thompson · https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Velociraptor_(IMG_Worlds_of_Adventure)_1.jpg -->

entries.name: Legoland Windsor
entries.desc: A Lego-themed park in Berkshire with rides, brick-built models, and hands-on building areas geared to younger children. It sits close to Windsor Castle for a combined day out.

photo.alt: Entrance to Legoland Windsor Resort in Berkshire
photo.credit: <!-- photo: legoland-windsor-entrance.jpg — Wikimedia Commons CC BY-SA 2.0 · "Entrance to Legoland Windsor, Berkshire - geograph.org.uk - 3125737.jpg" by Steven Haslington · https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Entrance_to_Legoland_Windsor,_Berkshire_-_geograph.org.uk_-_3125737.jpg -->

entries.name: Walt Disney World
entries.desc: A sprawling Florida resort of four theme parks, two water parks, and many hotels, connected by internal transport. Its scale supports multi-day family visits across varied attractions.

photo.alt: Cinderella Castle at Magic Kingdom, Walt Disney World
photo.credit: <!-- photo: cinderella-castle-magic-kingdom.jpg — Wikimedia Commons CC BY-SA 3.0 · "Cinderella Castle at Magic Kingdom.jpg" by Jedi94 · https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Cinderella_Castle_at_Magic_Kingdom.jpg -->

entries.name: Universal Orlando Resort
entries.desc: An Orlando resort of linked theme parks best known for the Wizarding World of Harry Potter areas. It leans toward older children and teens with its ride intensity.

photo.alt: Entrance arch to Universal Studios Florida, Orlando
photo.credit: <!-- photo: universal-studios-florida-entrance.jpg — Wikimedia Commons Public Domain · "Universal Studios Florida Gate.JPG" by Malpass93 · https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Universal_Studios_Florida_Gate.JPG -->

entries.name: Disneyland
entries.desc: The original Disney park in Anaheim, opened during Walt Disney's lifetime, with classic attractions in a walkable footprint. Its compact size suits families with younger children.

photo.alt: Sleeping Beauty Castle at Disneyland, Anaheim
photo.credit: <!-- photo: sleeping-beauty-castle-disneyland.jpg — Wikimedia Commons CC BY-SA 3.0 · "Sleeping Beauty Castle DLR.jpg" by Carterhawk · https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Sleeping_Beauty_Castle_DLR.jpg -->

entries.name: San Diego Zoo
entries.desc: Set in Balboa Park, this large zoo is known for naturalistic habitats and a guided bus tour of its hilly grounds. The variety and transport options ease long family visits.

photo.alt: San Diego Zoo grounds and Skyfari aerial tram, Balboa Park
photo.credit: <!-- photo: san-diego-zoo-grounds.jpg — Wikimedia Commons CC BY 3.0 · "San Diego Zoo - panoramio.jpg" by qwesy qwesy · https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:San_Diego_Zoo_-_panoramio.jpg -->
